reviews: Finally found a barber who actually listens. The attention to detail is unmatched.
Walked in looking rough, walked out looking like a million bucks. These guys are artists.
The vibe in here is incredible. Great music, cold drinks, and the most precise lineups I've ever gotten.
tagline: The Art of the Perfect Cut
description: Sheared The Barbershop - Midtown Houston is more than a barbershop — it's an experience. Our skilled barbers combine traditional techniques with modern styles to deliver precision cuts in a relaxed, welcoming atmosphere.
